title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy as an early example of iterative self-improvement applied to software development. The video explores simulation and argues that while not universally applicable, AutoResearch offers a novel approach to improving software engineering workflows.
